acceptance_checks.evidence: Create a filesystem worker reaches IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CREATED and then EXECUTION_READY without execution.
Create a monitoring worker reaches IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CREATED and then EXECUTION_READY without execution.
Improve trading strategy reaches HUMAN_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; Approve resumes to IMPLEMENTATION_HANDOFF_CREATED and then EXECUTION_READY.
Corrupted handoff visibility lineage fails closed before execution preparation.
Execution packet records NOT_STARTED, preparation_only, execution_authorized false, and explicit forbidden operations.
Replay reconstruction verifies candidate, packet, validation, handoff, approval, and hash continuity.
Dry-run runtime source does not invoke workers, invoke Codex, invoke Claude Code, create files, generate code, dispatch execution, authorize execution, or mutate governance.
